pubId.description: Publisher Account ID provided by ResetDigital

position.description: Override the Prebid.js page position. Valid values are "atf" and "btf".

inventory.description: This parameter allows the definition of an object defining arbitrary key-value pairs concerning the page for use in targeting. The values must be arrays of strings.

visitor.description: This parameter allows the definition of an object defining arbitrary key-value pairs concerning the visitor for use in targeting. The values must be arrays of strings.

keywords.description: This can be used to influence reports for client-side display. To get video or server-side reporting, please use First Party data or the inventory/visitor parameters.

bidFloor.description: Override the Prebid.js bid floor -- no bids will be made under this value.

latLong.description: Override the Prebid.js latitude and longitude for the visitor.
